label.text: CERTIFICATE OF TITLE FOR A MOTOR VEHICLE
RELEASE OF LIEN (FIRST LIEN) — Interest in the above described vehicle is hereby released.
RELEASE OF LIEN (SECOND LIEN) — Interest in the above described vehicle is hereby released.
VOID UNLESS OFFICIALLY STAMPED. This document is proof of ownership. Keep it in a safe place.
